arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's Sammy Silvera Middlesbrough future insistance after Portsmouth loan struggles
arts.sum: Michael Carrick says Sammy Silvera can still have a future at Middlesbrough, despite his struggles on loan at Portsmouth in the first half of the season. He’s our player Sammy, and he did a lot of good things last season.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Middlesbrough injury and team news 12 out and 3 doubts
arts.sum: Pompey face Middlesbrough at Fratton Park in an EFL Championship match on Saturday, January 18.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth fears over how faithful could play role in relegating their side from Championship this season
arts.sum: Pompey are harboring concerns over a nightmare scenario in which supporters could inadvertently relegate John Mousinho’s side this season.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth rivals Cardiff land striker in potential £3.3m deal as 64-cap Morocco international joins Hull
arts.sum: Pompey slipped to second-from-bottom in the Championship table this week following defeat to Blackburn and results elsewhere going against them.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ big concern over move for Premier League youngsters as he eyes top-flight squads
arts.sum: John Mousinho has outlined his reservations over recruiting Premier League youngsters as Pompey’s player chase continues.

arts.ttl: 'I think it's apparent' - the harsh reality facing Portsmouth as January transfer window reaches halfway point
arts.sum: Pompey have been warned they will be relegated from the Championship if their remaining transfer needs are not met this month.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough goalkeeper admission as January transfer deal explored
arts.sum: Asked if they might enter the market for a new goalkeeper after the links to Travers, Carrick said: “It’s certainly something we’ve looked at and will continue to do so as the month goes on - assess where that lies and how it will work in terms of fitness and availability and also moving forward. Though Carrick would not speak about any individuals specifically, he did confirm that Boro will be assessing their options this month and could enter the market for a new shot-stopper.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Middlesbrough: Two changes in predicted line-up as play-off chasers arrive at Fratton
arts.sum: Pompey return to their home comforts as they face play-off chasing Middlesbrough at Fratton.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak transfer stance made clear as bidding war for Liverpool's £30m man addressed by Middlesbrough boss
arts.sum: The Scotland international has been subject to interest from Premier League clubs

arts.ttl: Financial accounts show Middlesbrough are making important strides on and off the field
arts.sum: Looking at the wage bill, the initial figure that jumps out is that wages rose six per cent for the year and were the second highest in the division of clubs not in receipt of Premier League parachute payments. This past week saw Middlesbrough publish its accounts for the 2023/24 financial year, a season when Boro finished eighth in the Championship and reached the semi-finals of the EFL Cup.
